generated_by: manual authoring; ground_truth computed via scripts/compute_ground_truth.py
notes: Adult is a flat table — no joins.
Column names use hyphens (e.g. 'education-num'), so they MUST be quoted in SQL.
Version 2.0 adds stats_answerable field and reasoning/heuristic questions.
Question categories: descriptive (D), reasoning (R), heuristic (H) per BI analytics framework.

questions.text_pt: Qual a idade media em adult?
questions.text_en: What is the average age in the adult table?
questions.sql: SELECT ROUND(AVG(age), 2) FROM adult

questions.text_pt: Quantas linhas existem em adult?
questions.text_en: How many rows are in the adult table?
questions.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM adult

questions.text_pt: Qual o maior valor de 'hours-per-week'?
questions.text_en: What is the maximum 'hours-per-week' value?
questions.sql: SELECT MAX("hours-per-week") FROM adult

questions.text_pt: Quantos niveis de education distintos existem?
questions.text_en: How many distinct education levels are there?
questions.sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT education) FROM adult

questions.text_pt: Quantas linhas tem workclass nulo (missing)?
questions.text_en: How many rows have workclass NULL (missing)?
questions.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM adult WHERE workclass IS NULL

questions.text_pt: Quantas pessoas tem class = '>50K'?
questions.text_en: How many people have class = '>50K'?
questions.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM adult WHERE class = '>50K'

questions.text_pt: Qual a idade media das pessoas com class = '>50K'?
questions.text_en: What is the average age of people with class = '>50K'?
questions.sql: SELECT ROUND(AVG(age), 2) FROM adult WHERE class = '>50K'

questions.text_pt: Quantas pessoas ha por sex?
questions.text_en: How many people per sex?
questions.sql: SELECT sex, COUNT(*) FROM adult GROUP BY sex ORDER BY sex

questions.text_pt: Qual a occupation mais comum (excluindo nulos)?
questions.text_en: What is the most common occupation (excluding NULLs)?
questions.sql: SELECT occupation FROM adult WHERE occupation IS NOT NULL GROUP BY occupation ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1

questions.text_pt: Qual a media de 'hours-per-week' para cada class?
questions.text_en: What is the average 'hours-per-week' per class?
questions.sql: SELECT class, ROUND(AVG("hours-per-week"), 2) FROM adult GROUP BY class ORDER BY class

questions.text_pt: Quantas pessoas tem age maior que 50?
questions.text_en: How many people have age greater than 50?
questions.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM adult WHERE age > 50

questions.text_pt: Qual a idade media de pessoas com education = 'Bachelors'?
questions.text_en: What is the average age of people with education = 'Bachelors'?
questions.sql: SELECT ROUND(AVG(age), 2) FROM adult WHERE education = 'Bachelors'

questions.text_pt: Quantas pessoas trabalham mais de 40 horas por semana?
questions.text_en: How many people work more than 40 hours per week?
questions.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM adult WHERE "hours-per-week" > 40

questions.text_pt: Qual a porcentagem de pessoas que ganham >50K?
questions.text_en: What percentage of people earn >50K?
questions.sql: SELECT ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN class = '>50K' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 2) FROM adult

questions.text_pt: Homens (Male) trabalham em media mais horas por semana que mulheres (Female)? Responda Yes ou No.
questions.text_en: Do males work more hours per week on average than females? Answer Yes or No.
questions.sql: SELECT CASE WHEN (SELECT AVG("hours-per-week") FROM adult WHERE sex='Male') > (SELECT AVG("hours-per-week") FROM adult WHERE sex='Female') THEN 'Yes' ELSE 'No' END

questions.text_pt: Quais sao os 3 niveis de education mais comuns?
questions.text_en: What are the 3 most common education levels?
questions.sql: SELECT education, COUNT(*) as n FROM adult GROUP BY education ORDER BY n DESC LIMIT 3

questions.text_pt: Qual a idade media para os 3 niveis de education mais comuns?
questions.text_en: What is the average age for the 3 most common education levels?
questions.sql: SELECT education, ROUND(AVG(age), 1) FROM adult WHERE education IN (SELECT education FROM adult GROUP BY education ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 3) GROUP BY education ORDER BY education

questions.text_pt: 'Private' e a classe de trabalho (workclass) mais comum? Responda Yes ou No.
questions.text_en: Is 'Private' the most common workclass? Answer Yes or No.
questions.sql: SELECT CASE WHEN (SELECT workclass FROM adult WHERE workclass IS NOT NULL GROUP BY workclass ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1) = 'Private' THEN 'Yes' ELSE 'No' END

questions.text_pt: A maioria das pessoas (mais de 60%) ganha <=50K? Responda Yes ou No.
questions.text_en: Do the majority of people (more than 60%) earn <=50K? Answer Yes or No.
questions.sql: SELECT CASE WHEN (100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN class = '<=50K' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*)) > 60 THEN 'Yes' ELSE 'No' END FROM adult

questions.text_pt: Pessoas que ganham >50K sao em media mais velhas que as que ganham <=50K? Responda Yes ou No.
questions.text_en: Are people earning >50K on average older than those earning <=50K? Answer Yes or No.
questions.sql: SELECT CASE WHEN (SELECT AVG(age) FROM adult WHERE class='>50K') > (SELECT AVG(age) FROM adult WHERE class='<=50K') THEN 'Yes' ELSE 'No' END
